text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think I'd like to increase the number of
laps.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should consult my trainer about it as soon as I
can. I wonder if they'll still be in their office...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. And don't forget to ask for a rod and
tackle for our fishing trip while you're at it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Come now, Sei. I don't recall agreeing to any such
excursion.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You didn't? Well, that's a drag.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I was just kinda thinking you've changed,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? In what way? I don't feel any different...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon. You of all people, looking for a
trainer's advice? I almost didn't believe my ears!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: My little Grass is finally learning to rely on others. Sniff, sniff... You've made your mother so proud.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Oh, cut it out. Since when did you become
my mother?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My, what a life-changing revelation! I'll have to
start calling you "Mom" from now on. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I simply must introduce you to my class and
dormmates. Surely they'd love to meet my
long-lost mother.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ha... hahaha... I, uh, maybe I'll get a few more
laps in first.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Silly Sei... Though she might be right that
I've changed.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, goodness... Now I'm getting all flustered and
self-conscious. How am I to consult my trainer in
this state?
